The '''climbing tauntaun''' was a subspecies of [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntaun]] which originated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Known as the smallest of its [[Species/Legends|species]], it had the two upward curving horns that met just above the top its head and used its wide paws studded with heavy claws to climb [[glacier]]s and [[Cave/Legends|caves]]. It subsisted on a diet of lichens and moss.<ref name="Wildlife">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref>
